creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: acm->portmgr

- itetcu suggested to use name with -devel suffix for [linux-]opera-next ports, 
because it is the common name-suffix used for alpha/beta/rc apps added to  
ports tree 

Please, just repocopy www/linux-opera -> www/linux-opera-devel. Currently,  
www/opera-devel is part of ports
